tasks.subject: Task 1: 순수 zone 데이터 레이어 (타입+멤버십+파싱+가져오기)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** zone 순수 로직(HueZone, lightsInZone, zone 파싱, planZoneImports) TDD additive.

**Files:** hueTypes.ts, roomOps.ts, hueNoteParse.ts, hueImport.ts + {roomOps,hueNoteParse,hueImport}.test.ts

**Acceptance:** HueZone; lightsInZone(children light 직접·순서보존·device-hop 없음); parse zone:<uuid>→zoneId; planZoneImports(skip/title+zone:<id>/폴백); hue 그린+check 0.

**Verify:** cd /var/home/umayloveme/workspace/tomboy-web/.worktrees/po/app && npx vitest run tests/unit/hue/roomOps.test.ts tests/unit/hue/hueNoteParse.test.ts tests/unit/hue/hueImport.test.ts && npm run check

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/src/lib/hue/hueTypes.ts", "app/src/lib/hue/roomOps.ts", "app/src/lib/hue/hueNoteParse.ts", "app/src/lib/hue/hueImport.ts", "app/tests/unit/hue/roomOps.test.ts", "app/tests/unit/hue/hueNoteParse.test.ts", "app/tests/unit/hue/hueImport.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd /var/home/umayloveme/workspace/tomboy-web/.worktrees/po/app && npx vitest run tests/unit/hue/roomOps.test.ts tests/unit/hue/hueNoteParse.test.ts tests/unit/hue/hueImport.test.ts && npm run check", "acceptanceCriteria": ["HueZone", "lightsInZone", "zone 파싱+zoneId", "planZoneImports", "hue 그린+check 0"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: RoomControl→GroupControl 일반화 + 플러그인 zone 배선
tasks.description:
**Goal:** RoomControl→GroupControl 일반화(groupKind prop, 멤버십 분기); 플러그인 room·zone 둘 다 GroupControl.

**Files:** RoomControl.svelte→GroupControl.svelte, hueNotePlugin.ts, roomDoc.ts(주석), hueNotePlugin.test.ts

**Acceptance:** GroupControl props{groupKind,groupId,view}; load GET ${groupKind}/${groupId}+멤버십 분기+scene rid===groupId; saveScene rtype=groupKind; 플러그인 room|zone→GroupControl+key zoneId; zone 위젯 테스트+room 유지; check 0+hue 그린.

**Verify:** cd /var/home/umayloveme/workspace/tomboy-web/.worktrees/po/app && npx vitest run tests/unit/hue/hueNotePlugin.test.ts && npm run check

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/src/lib/editor/hueNote/GroupControl.svelte", "app/src/lib/editor/hueNote/hueNotePlugin.ts", "app/src/lib/hue/roomDoc.ts", "app/tests/unit/hue/hueNotePlugin.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd /var/home/umayloveme/workspace/tomboy-web/.worktrees/po/app && npx vitest run tests/unit/hue/hueNotePlugin.test.ts && npm run check", "acceptanceCriteria": ["GroupControl groupKind", "load 멤버십 분기+scene 필터", "saveScene rtype=groupKind", "플러그인 room|zone+key zoneId", "zone 위젯+room 유지", "check 0+hue 그린"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: MasterDashboard — 존 가져오기 + 존 묶음 블록
